programmes.show_description: This is CBBC! Tune every day from 7.00am.

The Check-Up. Mr Krabs is too scared to get his physical.
Leaf Collector. Duck must pick up leaves from the park, but Frog's arrival makes it seem impossible.
Chef. When Duck and Frog get a job in a restaurant kitchen, Frog accidentally makes the soup incredibly spicy. He wants to serve it to a celebrity chef, but Duck wants to stop him!
A Case of the Sillies. The Odd Squad investigates strange events. Dr O gets an odd illness called the sillies.
Legendary Sandwich. The team go on quests to create the perfect sandwich.

programmes.show_description: 24 Hour Party Sheep. Eat, sheep, rave, repeat! Glow sticks at the ready - there's a party in a field, and everyone is invited.

Dog Walker. Duck realises that dogs are a duck's best friend when he walks a poodle.

programmes.show_name: Grizzy and the Lemmings: World Tour
programmes.show_description: For Real. The Lemmings find a strange card game.
Vampire Strikes Back. The gang visits the Hex Girls at a Transylvanian castle and runs into a real-life vampire.
Moving Bubble Bass. SpongeBob and Patrick help Bubble Bass move.
High Sea Diving. SpongeBob dives up to the surface.
Catiquette. Max and Gark must pass a series of tests to sit in the perfect sunbathing spot.

Whales of Mystery. Shellington and Peso try to track down a rare whale, who has lost its tooth.

The Crustacean Vacation. The Piris help a tricky family of touring crabs, but will they be happy with their visit?
Pizza. Duck has to deliver pizzas around the town, but he hasn't reckoned with the lengths that Frog will go to to get them all for himself.
The Un-Quest. When the heroes go on a quest to help a cute little squirrel, they soon realise she is not who she appears to be, and have to un-quest their quest.
The School Photo Screen Away. A hair disaster and wild detour leave Aoife across town. Can she stop Jim's big proposal?

Baa-gherita! Word gets out that the best pizza is to be had from the Mossy Bottom Takeaway.
The Comedy Crown. The gang enter Pieface into a comedy contest to make him realise how funny he is.
Herbert's Compost. When a Wind Dragon ruins Herbert's plants, he turns to Stinkweasel for help. But now the heroes must quest to defend the forest from stinky compost!

Large Dragon at Large. The gang attends a Renaissance faire, where a dragon interrupts their fun!

Matched. A computer dating program matches Beast Boy to Raven.
The Prankster. With Iono's help, Dot confronts a trainer who has been playing pranks with his Stunfisk.
